productDisplayName: Kiara Women Square Design Black Handbag
description: Cute-as-a-button bag in black and grey from kiara with smart buckles and a fun tassle.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the textured leather effect fabric will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 28cmWidth: 32cmDepth: 6cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with two internal zipped pockets and internal organiser pocketsTwo short handles for carrying ease attached to the bag with a buckle system, alternate long strap providedZipped pocket with oversized tassle zip pull on frontZipped pocket on backCute round shape with bag body gathered to base and squares printCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
